returned Document represents parsed tree of HTML '

' with baseUri 'http://example.com'

"); String baseUri = "base";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader inputHtml, String baseUri) throws UncheckedIOException when underlying Reader throws IOException on first read
scenarios.precondition: Reader stub that throws IOException on read (why mocking: to simulate I/O error)
pseudocode: Reader reader = new Reader(){ public int read(char[] cbuf,int off,int len)throws IOException{ throw new IOException("io"); } public void close(){} }; String baseUri="u";
